rationale: Keeps the adult sample in a range where own education is largely complete.
Suppresses sparse descriptive cells and unstable subgroup estimates.
Prevents pooled regressions from being fit on undersized combined samples.
Requires broad pooled support before an optional household control can enter the extended specification.

applies_to: Candidate extended controls in each wave
rationale: Prevents a control from entering when support collapses in one wave.
Requires observed variation before a control can be used in the extended specification.
Avoids logit estimation on very small complete-case samples.
Requires at least minimal support in each parental-education group.
Requires at least two events and two non-events in each group for each outcome.
